title: FAKIR: Foundational Architecture for Knowledge, Intelligence & Reasoning (UKOP kernel)
description: Kernel of the Universal Knowledge Operating Platform (UKOP). v0.5: the site root IS the zistgah.org landing file - inline Three.js build, CHAKRA calendars and dial, oculus time scrub, flight system, worlds, exhibits, nebula, dawn, PWA (manifest/sw/icons) - transformed in place with 9 marked config seams and FAKIR's lattice mounted in the hall group: every UN ISIC Rev.4 (21/88/238/419), ILO ISCO-08 (10/43/130/436) and UNESCO ISCED-F 2013 (11/29/80) node - 1,505 nodes, 935 leaves x AGI stack L0-L9 = 9,350 points floating inside the homepage dome. Headless-executed via jsdom harness (boot, seams, tree, search, panel, display: 3 clouds/9,350 pts/10 rings/highlight). Every node seeds an oracle-gated AAB task (VGC doi:10.5281/zenodo.21264248). vendor/zistgah-dome remains the lift-out lib. Poster corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21436552. v0.5 restructure: the dome page is index.html at the repo root (zistgah.org/fakir/); docs/ and explore/ removed.
notes: (c) 1993-2026 Abhishek Choudhary. All rights reserved. AI model: Claude Fable 5 (Anthropic). DOI injected post-mint; no fabrication.
